contract: CLI `migrate` advances an installed part when the registry itemSchemaVersion moves; `update` advances version/sourceHash; `rollback` restores locked content. Every part below carries the schemaVersion it migrates to and its lifecycle version.

parts.name: button
parts.migrationNotes: Initial authored resident primitive; no installed API migration exists yet.

parts.name: jami-theme
parts.migrationNotes: Initial theme item. Files are the generated token outputs; regenerate with pnpm contracts:generate when the token source changes.

parts.name: solo-workspace
parts.migrationNotes: Workspace shell installs generated route/page/block/component descriptors from authored source; full React app implementation remains pending.
